news.t: How emerging-markets stocks can keep trouncing the S&P 500

holdings.infoBox: PXH is an equity ETF with a total of 405 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Invesco RAFI Emerging Markets ETF (PXH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of emerging market companies selected and weighted based on a fundamental methodology. PXH was launched on Sep 27, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: RAFI Fundamental Select Emerging Markets 350 Index

data.title: How emerging-markets stocks can keep trouncing the S&P 500
data.text: Emerging-market stocks have broadly crushed the U.S. equities market this year, in one of the biggest market surprises of 2025.

data.title: 8 Funds to Consider if China's Efforts to Revive Economy Gain Traction
data.text: Investors have pulled back but stocks could take off if intensified steps to bolster the post-Covid-19 recovery pan out.

data.title: Invesco ETF Looks to Find Value in Emerging Markets
data.text: Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas and Scarlet Fu break down the Invesco FTSE RAFI Emerging Markets ETF (ticker: PXH) with John Frank, equity ETF strategist at Invesco.
